import React from 'react'; import '../Styling/PDFViewer.css'; const PDFViewer = ({ pdfPath, title, author }) => { return (
📄

{title}

By {author}

⬇️ Download
💡 Use the toolbar above to zoom, navigate, or download
); }; export default PDFViewer;
